description: If all you need is a toned butt and hamstrings but hate those morning walks in toners, then this Tone Up short shorts flip flop from skechers is perfect for you. Designed with a shock absorbing, lightweight midsole to reduce impact on the joints and provide a more natural walking surface, these slippers are a great way to tone up when walking around the house, to a shop or to catch up with close pals. Heel height: 1 2/3" Upper Soft neoprene fabric upper in a flip flop thong sandal style, with a soft neoprene fabric lining Crackle distressed finish with soft neoprene edging and stitch detailing Perforations for enhanced ventilation Cushioned and contoured comfort foam footbed with a heel gel comfort pad, toe ridge and rounded, smooth toe post for added comfort Floral print designs on footbed Midsole Shock absorbing lightweight foam for absolute comfort and energy return Outsole Shock absorbing wedge heel with a TPR flexible traction outsole slipper care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
